name: drill-dark
title: Dark Drill
description: Menacing UK/Bronx-drill energy — sliding 808s, icy hats, and a cold, cinematic dread.
style: dark drill, sliding 808 bass, icy hi-hats, eerie piano lead, ~140 BPM half-time, gritty raw male rap, menacing, cinematic, no autotune

production.drums: drill kit, skippy hats, rim-shot snares
production.mixVibe: cold, wide, vocal slightly distant for dread

hookGuidance: short, chanted, repeat the darkest line twice
